descriptionShort: Profile of defenceman Hervey discussing his experience with Richmond Sockeyes coach Orland Kurtenbach and their Centennial Cup championship.
descriptionLong: A profile of defenceman Hervey, who credits Richmond Sockeyes coach Orland Kurtenbach with improving his outlook and performance. Hervey recorded 24 points in 17 regular-season games and was named to the first all-star team as the Sockeyes won the Centennial Cup national junior championship at Humboldt, Saskatchewan. The article discusses Hervey's path to professional hockey and his current stint with a Winnipeg Jets affiliate.
